fields.name: Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch
fields.description: A professional laptop designed for creators and developers, featuring a stunning Retina display and exceptional performance powered by the M2 Max chip, along with long-lasting battery life.

fields.name: Dell XPS 15
fields.description: An elegant, high-performance device with a brilliant OLED display. Perfect for content creators, thanks to its 13th Gen processor and powerful graphics card.

fields.name: HP Spectre x360
fields.description: A premium 2-in-1 convertible laptop featuring a luxurious design and a smart pen. Lightweight and ideal for business professionals and students.

fields.name: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11
fields.description: The ultimate choice for business, featuring a legendary keyboard, high durability, and an ultra-lightweight build that makes it the perfect travel companion.

fields.name: Asus ROG Zephyrus G14
fields.description: A compact gaming laptop that offers an incredible balance between performance and portability, featuring an excellent high-refresh-rate display.

fields.name: Acer Predator Helios 300
fields.description: Designed specifically for hardcore gamers, offering exceptional cooling and a seamless gaming experience powered by a robust processor and an advanced graphics card.

fields.name: Apple MacBook Air M2
fields.description: Apple's thinnest and lightest laptop, delivering remarkable performance for everyday use with all-day battery life and a fanless design.

fields.name: MSI Raider GE78 HX
fields.description: Unmatched raw power with dazzling RGB lighting. It serves as a complete desktop replacement, capable of running the heaviest applications and games.

fields.name: Razer Blade 15
fields.description: Combines the elegance of a slim metallic design with the sheer power of gaming components for a truly premium experience.

fields.name: Dell Alienware m15 R7
fields.description: A distinctive alien-inspired design paired with powerful performance and an incredible screen refresh rate, making it ideal for competitive gaming enthusiasts.

fields.name: HP Envy 16
fields.description: Designed for creators at an affordable price relative to its performance. Features a highly color-accurate display and a graphics card that supports fast rendering.

fields.name: Asus ZenBook 14 OLED
fields.description: A thin and light laptop with an OLED display that delivers vibrant colors and deep blacks. Perfect for content consumption and work.

fields.name: Lenovo Legion Pro 5i
fields.description: Excellent value for gamers, featuring robust build quality and an advanced cooling system that maintains stable performance.

fields.name: Acer Swift X 14
fields.description: Aimed at budget-conscious content creators, this device combines a powerful processor and a dedicated graphics card within a lightweight chassis.

fields.name: Microsoft Surface Laptop 5
fields.description: The pure Windows experience featuring a gorgeous PixelSense display and a 3:2 aspect ratio, making it perfectly suited for productivity and office work.
